title: Gardening Of Human Condition
definition: The recognition that every individual has the power to shape and influence the emotional and social environment around them, akin to tending a garden.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The recognition that every individual has the power to shape and influence the emotional and social environment around them, akin to tending a garden.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The recognition that every individual has the power to shape and influence the emotional and social environment around them, akin to tending a garden.
difficulty_levels.expert: Understanding that each action has a causal effect on others and the world, encouraging responsibility and compassion in one's actions.

extra_fields.insight: Understanding that each action has a causal effect on others and the world, encouraging responsibility and compassion in one's actions.
